title: Merge Models
subtitle: Pull tables and columns from a SOURCE erwin XML into a TARGET. One-way; nothing in target is removed.

load.heading: 1. Load source and target
load.explainer: Drop two erwin DM 9.x XML files. The SOURCE is the model you're pulling new tables and columns FROM; the TARGET is the model you're merging INTO. Nothing in TARGET is removed — this is a one-way add.
load.sourceSub: Model to pull tables & columns FROM
load.wrongVariant: This file is not erwin-dm-v9. Merge supports erwin-dm-v9 only.

plan.heading: 2. Pick what to move
plan.noopBanner: ✓ Target already contains everything in source — nothing to merge.

result.heading: 3. Done
result.nextFilePreview: New file will be saved as:
